development.STAN_list: OAuth 2.0; RFC 6749; RFC 7591; RFC 7592; RFC 7009; RFC 7636; RFC 7517

moderators.language_notes: Portal available in multiple languages (de, en, es, fr) based on URL parameters

evidence.API_evidence: PSD2 Open Banking APIs documented with OAuth 2 endpoints, account information services, payment initiation services. Multiple API versions (v1, v1.1, v2.0, v2.1, v2.2) with GET and POST methods for /accounts, /transactions endpoints.
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDKs found - only API documentation and OpenAPI specifications provided.
evidence.language_evidence: Portal supports multiple languages via URL parameter {lang} with values: de, en, es, fr

coding_notes: AGE=3 based on three major API versions (v2.0, v2.1, v2.2 - using oldest v2.0 from 2020). API_YEAR=2019 from initial v1 publication. OPEN=0 because access requires qualification as Third Party Payment Service Provider with NCA authorization and QTSP certificates - not free self-service registration. CERT=1 due to formal qualification process requiring NCA authorization and QTSP certificates. ROLE=1 due to OAuth scopes (aisp, cbpii, pisp) providing different access levels. DATA=1 implied by PSD2 regulatory framework requiring data governance policies. BUG=1 for sandbox environment at oauth2-apisi.e-i.com/sandbox/cm/.
